Freebuff vs InternLM

Compare Freebuff and InternLM: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

Coding Assistant

No
Paid From
Codebuff from $100/mo

Freebuff

Free AI coding agent that edits code via natural language in terminal. Based on paid Codebuff, ad-supported. Uses DeepSeek V4 Flash by default, supports Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7 and other models.

Pros

  • ✓Completely free, ads for credits
  • ✓No config needed, works out of box
  • ✓Supports multiple domestic models
  • ✓Built-in code review and browser use
  • ✓Open source MIT license

Cons

  • ✗Ads in terminal
  • ✗DeepSeek V4 Pro trains on data
  • ✗Not available in all countries
  • ✗Requires internet, no offline use

Key Features

Natural language coding in terminal9 built-in sub-agentsDeepSeek V4 FlashCode reviewBrowser useDeep thinkingOpen source MIT license
View Details →

InternLM

InternLM API from Shanghai AI Lab. Free tier: 10 RPM, API key valid for 6 months. InternVL3-78B is a multimodal model with strong image-text understanding. Domestic access, solid academic background.

Pros

  • ✓Accessible from China without VPN
  • ✓Solid academic backing from Shanghai AI Lab
  • ✓InternVL3 has strong multimodal capabilities
  • ✓Completely free

Cons

  • ✗10 RPM is very low
  • ✗API key expires after 6 months
  • ✗Limited model selection

Key Features

InternVL3-78B MultimodalChina Direct AccessFree to Use
View Details →
